nasb.text: And I will grant authority to my two witnesses, and they will prophesy for twelve hundred and sixty days, clothed in sackcloth.”

esv.text: And I will grant authority to my two witnesses, and they will prophesy for 1,260 days, clothed in sackcloth.”

cnv.text: 我要賜能力給我那兩個穿著麻衣的見證人，他們要傳道一千二百六十天。”

ccb.text: 我要赐权柄给我的两个见证人，他们将身穿麻衣，传道一千二百六十天。”

csbs.text: 我将赐能力给我的两个见证人，他们将披着麻衣，做先知传道一千二百六十天。”
